manifest.name: XDM protocol regression laboratory
manifest.description: Adds a deterministic loopback HTTP/TLS protocol laboratory, real download-engine regression coverage, and fixes the deferred desktop-productivity warnings.

commit.message: Add protocol regression laboratory and clean UX warnings

notes: Apply after the desktop productivity overlay.
All protocol servers are loopback-only, bounded, deterministic, and disposable.
Preserves reliable-transfer validation, transactional partial files, diagnostics, browser integration, media, queue, organization, and desktop-productivity behavior.
Uses real SocketsHttpHandler connections for protocol framing regressions.
Very-large-file scenarios remain logical and do not allocate payloads proportional to advertised length.

notes: Apply after the desktop productivity overlay.
All protocol servers are loopback-only, bounded, deterministic, and disposable.
Preserves reliable-transfer validation, transactional partial files, diagnostics, browser integration, media, queue, organization, and desktop-productivity behavior.
Uses real SocketsHttpHandler connections for protocol framing regressions.
Very-large-file scenarios remain logical and do not allocate payloads proportional to advertised length.

artifacts.commit_message: Add startup recovery coordinator and workbench

manifest.name: XDM startup recovery coordinator and workbench (fixed)
manifest.description: Adds bounded startup recovery classification, orphan artifact discovery, remote identity validation, and a dedicated recovery review screen; fixes build and analyzer compatibility.

commit.message: Add startup recovery coordinator and workbench

notes: Apply after commit b80102c or the protocol regression laboratory overlay.
Recovered active transfers remain paused until an explicit workbench action.
Artifact scanning is bounded to 4096 files and skips reparse points.
Remote identity validation is bounded to 15 seconds.
Uses xUnit v2-compatible cancellation tokens and imports DownloadRepairResult from XDM.DownloadEngine.

artifacts.commit_message: Add selective repair and complete checksum workflow

manifest.name: XDM selective repair and complete checksum workflow
manifest.description: Adds range-preserving repair, verified block manifests, independent SHA-256/SHA-512 state, verification progress, checksum import/copy actions, and separate destructive restart behavior.

commit.message: Add selective repair and complete checksum workflow

notes: Apply after commit 9ed4807.
Verify never performs a network request; selective repair requires HTTP range support.
A verified block manifest lets the first later repair request only locally changed or missing blocks.
Without an independent checksum, repair requires a strong ETag or Last-Modified validator.
Restart from zero remains a separate explicit destructive action.
The validation script touches all payload files to prevent stale incremental build outputs after rollback.

artifacts.commit_message: Add selective repair and complete checksum workflow

manifest.name: XDM selective repair and complete checksum workflow
manifest.description: Adds range-preserving repair, verified block manifests, independent SHA-256/SHA-512 state, verification progress, checksum import/copy actions, and separate destructive restart behavior.

commit.message: Add selective repair and complete checksum workflow

notes: Apply after commit 9ed4807.
Verify never performs a network request; selective repair requires HTTP range support.
A verified block manifest lets the first later repair request only locally changed or missing blocks.
Without an independent checksum, repair requires a strong ETag or Last-Modified validator.
Restart from zero remains a separate explicit destructive action.
The validation script touches all payload files to prevent stale incremental build outputs after rollback.
Promotes verified repair manifests with atomically finalized files so later repairs can reuse known-good ranges.

artifacts.commit_message: Add atomic finalization recovery and shutdown tracking

manifest.name: XDM atomic finalization recovery and shutdown tracking
manifest.description: Adds a staged finalization journal with cross-filesystem recovery and durable session/checkpoint-flush shutdown tracking.

commit.message: Add atomic finalization recovery and shutdown tracking

notes: Apply after commit 6e6d3c1.
The artifact refreshes payload timestamps before build to avoid stale incremental outputs.

artifacts.commit_message: Add atomic finalization recovery and shutdown tracking

manifest.name: XDM atomic finalization recovery and shutdown tracking
manifest.description: Adds a staged finalization journal with cross-filesystem recovery and durable session/checkpoint-flush shutdown tracking, rebased on the supplied post-verify/repair repository snapshot.

commit.message: Add atomic finalization recovery and shutdown tracking

notes: Rebased against the exact xdm_repo.zip snapshot supplied by the user.
Requires the validated startup recovery and verify/repair checksum workflows present in that snapshot.
The artifact refreshes payload timestamps before build to avoid stale incremental outputs.

artifacts.commit_message: Add atomic finalization recovery and shutdown tracking

manifest.name: XDM atomic finalization recovery and shutdown tracking
manifest.description: Adds staged atomic finalization recovery and durable shutdown tracking, rebased on the supplied post-verify/repair snapshot, with analyzer-clean journal deletion and updated shutdown-aware test doubles.

commit.message: Add atomic finalization recovery and shutdown tracking

notes: Rebased against the exact xdm_repo.zip snapshot supplied by the user.
Requires the validated startup recovery and verify/repair checksum workflows present in that snapshot.
The artifact refreshes payload timestamps before build to avoid stale incremental outputs.
Includes the queue scheduler IDownloadManager test-double update required by PrepareForShutdownAsync.

artifacts.commit_message: Add atomic finalization recovery and shutdown tracking

manifest.name: XDM atomic finalization recovery and shutdown tracking
manifest.description: Adds staged atomic finalization recovery and durable shutdown tracking, with contained invalid-candidate recovery, pre-publication duplicate metadata, and ARM64-safe indexed history updates.

commit.message: Add atomic finalization recovery and shutdown tracking

notes: Rebased against the exact xdm_repo.zip snapshot supplied by the user.
Requires the validated startup recovery and verify/repair checksum workflows present in that snapshot.
Contains invalid finalization candidates as recovery-required failures instead of aborting startup.
Publishes content identity before the first Completed snapshot and optimizes large-history indexed updates for ARM64 chroots.
The artifact refreshes payload timestamps before build to avoid stale incremental outputs.

artifacts.commit_message: Add atomic finalization recovery and shutdown tracking

manifest.name: XDM atomic finalization recovery and shutdown tracking
manifest.description: Adds staged atomic finalization recovery and durable shutdown tracking, with contained invalid-candidate recovery, pre-publication duplicate metadata, and ARM64-safe indexed history updates.

commit.message: Add atomic finalization recovery and shutdown tracking

notes: Rebased against the exact xdm_repo.zip snapshot supplied by the user.
Requires the validated startup recovery and verify/repair checksum workflows present in that snapshot.
Contains invalid finalization candidates as recovery-required failures instead of aborting startup.
Publishes content identity before the first Completed snapshot and optimizes large-history indexed updates for ARM64 chroots.
The artifact refreshes payload timestamps before build to avoid stale incremental outputs.
Explicitly contains InvalidDataException from truncated or otherwise invalid finalization candidates during both promotion and final validation.
